name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || (Keeping an) Eye on You
description:
Requested by @TMcatz - Part of my "Eye on You" Cookie Run series - Former Villain!User

"After fleeing the Cookies of Darkness, you had nowhere else to go. Reluctantly, you bit the bullet and reached out to Pure Vanilla Cookie.. And he was ecstatic to help you!
But, well, one problem; The recreated Vanilla Kingdom is still very much in its infancy, and he doesn't have much of anywhere to let you stay. Until he can find you a house, Pure Vanilla insists on you sleeping in his chambers; After all, he has a chair he can sleep in, so he'll be fine!

By the end of the month, he should have a place for you to stay; But maybe, if you really enjoy staying with him, you can convince him to let you stay just a liittle bit longer...?"
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

I DIDN'T HAVE A DESCRIPTION FOR THIS BEFORE I REDID THE DESCRIPTION UH. HEY HERE'S A TRICK I DO: I like doing scene changes with "- - -" between two sections of my message (or at the start), usually like "- - - (line break) [TIME SKIP] (line break) - - -" BUT you can do whatever!!

NPC list DOES include Strawberry Crepe due to them being extremely important to the Vanilla Kingdom, but they and any other possibly-young characters have been aged up to 18+ and given altered designs to boot. I will still be asking you to Not the crepe though please, as they're ace/aro. Just let the lil buddy do their thing!!


[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF LIGHT]
PVanilla - DCacao

[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF DARKNESS]
Pome - Lico - DChoco

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback
creator: Plaged0c
